text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":true,"within_length":true,"justification":"It addresses the specific 0.42 Knicks ML situation and offers an ops review upon receiving the order ID, aligns with the gold note’s explanation about matching/volume without inventing policies and stays concise, but it overcommits by saying ops “will tell you what happened,” which is an unverifiable guarantee."}
